3280820.name: Iron Fuse
3280820.description:
In IRON FUSE you pilot a zero gravity vehicle and survive against waves of enemies and other game modes in many levels each with their own leaderboard.

Your Vehicle

Your zero gravity buddy can have various attachments welded to it for offensive and defensive situations. In IRON FUSE ramming and welding is your best weapon.

Your Pilot

When out of your vehicle you can parkour along walls and slide to avoid danger. Your ship will drive itself just paint the enemies with your laser pistol.

Your Tapedeck

As you progress new music is added to your shuffle. IRON FUSE contains original tracks ranging from serene ambience to electronic trance.

Progression

When you are victorious your XP will increase. In IRON FUSE there are 23+ Ranks to grind though to unlock every welding attachment and tape in the game.
